francophone.excerpt: Cette femme, "brisée" mais "forte", va se présenter devant les juges et les jurés de la Cour d'Assises des Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, à Digne-les-Bains, à partir de ce lundi.

francophone.excerpt: Le bateau, qui compte encore 27 membres d'équipage et du personnel médical, arrive pour son débarquement final et les opérations de désinfection.

francophone.excerpt: Le meurtrier, mort en prison en 2013, avait avoué avoir enterré sept jeunes femmes dans un terrain à Rouvray, près d’Auxerre. Seuls deux squelettes avaient pour l’heure été retrouvés.

francophone.title: EN DIRECT, guerre en Ukraine : la Russie a lancé plus de 500 projectiles cette nuit, selon l’armée de l’air ukrainienne
francophone.excerpt: Après un week-end marqué par des attaques massives de drones ukrainiens vers la Russie, Moscou a lancé 524 drones et 22 missiles dans la nuit de dimanche à lundi.

anglophone.title: Escaped tiger shot by German police after attacking man
anglophone.excerpt: The tiger escaped a facility owned by local trainer Carmen Zander, also known as Germany's "Tiger Queen", according to local media reports.

anglophone.title: Driver of crashed train tested positive for drugs, Thai police say

anglophone.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
anglophone.excerpt: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

anglophone.title: Peru's electoral board confirms June 7 presidential runoff
anglophone.excerpt: Authorities confirmed on Sunday the official results of the first round of the presidential elections in early April, with Keiko Fujimori and Roberto Sánchez advancing to the runoff on June 7.

anglophone.title: Drone strikes UAE nuclear plant highlighting risk of renewed war
anglophone.excerpt: A drone strike sparked a fire on the edge of the United Arab Emirates' sole nuclear power plant on Sunday in what authorities called an "unprovoked terrorist attack."

anglophone.title: Executions nearly doubled in the U.S. last year, and soared abroad
anglophone.excerpt: The number of people killed in state-sanctioned executions worldwide rose to a 44-year high in 2025, according to a new report from Amnesty International.

anglophone.title: Military aircrew in 'stable condition' following midair collision at Idaho air show
anglophone.excerpt: Two jets appeared to collide and their crews ejected during a performance at an air show at a military base in Idaho. "The aircrew involved in the incident are in stable condition," the base reported.
